Gilts Rattled on Andy Burnham’s First Day as Fiscal Fears Return
summary: UK government bonds dropped after new Prime Minister Andy Burnham unnerved investors on his first day in the job over his approach to the country’s finances.

title: Netflix Taps US High-Grade Bond Market With $1 Billion Debt Sale
summary: Netflix Inc. raised $1 billion from a US high-grade bond sale on Monday, its first since a debut deal two years ago, as slowing sales growth fuels investor scrutiny of the company’s future.

title: S&P Slips as Apple, Tesla Keep Broader Chipmaker Gains in Check
summary: The S&P 500 Index erased early gains to finish lower as a decline in Apple Inc. and Tesla Inc. offset advances elsewhere. Chipmakers rebounded ahead of a deluge of earnings reports that will test whether Big Tech’s profits can match high expectations.

title: Goldman Sells $2.5 Billion Preferreds Following Spread Low
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. priced new preferred shares Monday, just days after a metric determining risk and value in these securities hit its lowest level since the global financial crisis.

title: Latin America Outperforms as Emerging Market Currencies Gain
summary: Emerging-market currencies gained to start the week, with Latin American names getting a boost from a drop in volatility which further boosts their carry appeal.
